updates.heading: Q1 QPR Cycle Opens August 3 — AI Fluency Updates
bullets: QPR cycle opens August 3 (full timeline in thread from Dashini)
AI Fluency Rating: entirely your decision as PE — no draft ratings will be generated
AI Fluency Floors: High requires Integrator (3+), Exemplar requires Innovator/Amplifier (4+)
AI Usage Hub launching next week via Okta — monthly data refresh + training resources
Kristin flagging: define what ‘Integrator’ looks like on Invite before QPRs, discuss with pods in advance
Source: Dashini Jeyathurai — #pe-announcements Jun 18 / Kristin Ruehle — #invite-pes Jun 18

updates.heading: CX PE Summit — Week of August 24, Denver (Save the Date)

updates.heading: Confluence → Notion Migration Complete — Action by July 1
bullets: Migration complete; Confluence went live June 15

Flag any Confluence links now so they can be updated before go-live
Source: Scott Helmes — #people-team, June 18, 2026
